mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STANDARDIZE_OBJECTFIELD_REL (SET_ID, ID, RECNO, COLUMN_NAME, GADSJ_FIELDID, DICTIONARY_REF_ID, DICTIONARY_REF, DICTIONARY_CONTENT_ID, DICTIONARY_CONTENT, PARENT_ID, PARENT_COLUMN_NAME, CREATE_TIME, FIELDCHINESENAME) VALUES
(#{item.setId}, #{item.id}, #{item.recno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gadsjFieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dictionaryRefId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dictionaryRef,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dictionaryContentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dictionaryContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.parentColumnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{item.fieldChineseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update STANDARDIZE_OBJECTFIELD_REL set DICTIONARY_REF_ID = #{dictionaryRefId}, DICTIONARY_REF = #{dictionaryRef}, DICTIONARY_CONTENT_ID = #{dictionaryContentId}, DICTIONARY_CONTENT = #{dictionaryContent}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId}, UPDATE_TIME = sysdate where column_name = #{columnName} and gadsj_fieldId = #{gadsjFieldId}
